title: Device Home Screen - No device connected - Select Device link
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app home screen "Other devices" button opens Poly support web page when no device is connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Observe the Home screen with no device connected.
3. Tap the "Select Device" link on the Home screen.
4. Observe the list of supported devices with images displayed.
5. Tap the "Other devices" button at the bottom of the list.
expected: Tapping the "Other devices" button opens the Poly support web page in a browser.
